/usr/bin/x86_64-linux-gnu-g++ -fPIC -DQT_QML_DEBUG -g -shared -Wl,-soname,libcore.so -o ../ParagonApp/libcore.so CMakeFiles/core.dir/Core.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/Cube.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/MainWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/asset/Asset.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/asset/AssetLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/asset/AssetManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/asset/AssetManager_BROKEN_LEGACY.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/asset/AssetRegistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/asset/AssetScanner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/config/GraphicsConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/config/MetaConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/event/CoreEventManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/event/CoreEventTypeGraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/input/InputHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/input/KeyboardListener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/input/MouseListener.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/lua/LuaManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/lua/LuaScript.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/render/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/render/RenderHandler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/render/ShaderManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/render/TextRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/resource/FontResource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/resource/MaterialResource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/resource/MeshResource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/resource/ResourceManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/resource/SFXResource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/resource/ScriptResource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/resource/ShaderResource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/core.dir/resource/TextureResource.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../external" ../common/libcommon.a ../util/libutil.a -lglfw /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLEW.so -lGL -lX11 -lpthread -lXrandr -lXi -ldl -llua5.4
